infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 17 - 19 July 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 16:45, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 58 Date 19 July 2026 Time 16:18 No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilton Reason

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 16:45, in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 58
Date 19 July 2026
Time 16:18
No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilton
Reason Alleged breach of Article B1.6.2a of the FIA F1 Regulations – Pit lane incident at
15:45.
Gerd Ennser Matthew Selley
Alfonso Orihuela Pedro Lamy
Loïc Bacquelaine
